expo.name: Krowna
expo.description: The AI calendar that rules your time. Voice assistant, smart scheduling, focus mode.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Krowna needs microphone access for voice commands (Hey Krowna).
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Krowna uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice commands.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Krowna can sync with your Apple Calendar to show all your events in one place.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Krowna can import your reminders so they appear alongside your events.

plugins.calendarPermission: Krowna can import events from your Apple/Google calendar so they appear alongside your schedule.

plugins.microphonePermission: Krowna needs microphone access for voice commands.
Krowna listens for 'Hey Krowna' to take voice commands.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Krowna uses speech recognition to understand your voice commands.
